headline: Western Digital vs. NetApp: Which Data Storage Stock is the Better Buy?
summary: Western Digital's AI-driven storage demand, long-term growth targets and strong cash returns make it a better buy than NetApp.

headline: NetApp and Commvault Partner to Boost Cyber Resilience Solutions
summary: NTAP teams up with Commvault to launch an integrated cyber resilience solution, boosting ransomware detection, recovery speed and data protection across hybrid environments.
